recordings.title: TumorCrusher Tyler Cruz long reference
recordings.reuseCommand: Reference only. Use this to tune the free DJ generator; do not rerender unless needed.
recordings.notes: Longer paid Tyler Cruz reference generated once to guide the free Windows SAPI DJ pacing, pauses, and hype contour.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher hourly cycle: Marisol Latina DJ, three US voices, and core desks
recordings.voiceName: Kokoro am_fenrir + af_heart Marisol + af_bella Rebecca + am_michael Jax + bm_lewis AussieOnc + af_sarah Maya + am_echo Cole + am_adam
recordings.notes: Three-minute open-source hourly voice cycle for ASCO coverage. Marisol is the Latina high-hype DJ voice using Kokoro af_heart. Added US voices Jax on am_michael, Maya on af_sarah, and Cole on am_echo. Spoken ASCO is rendered as Ask-oh.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher Fenrir schedule, Rebecca reporter, AussieOnc global hype, and Adam social ASCO 2026 Day 1 run
recordings.voiceName: Kokoro am_fenrir + af_bella Rebecca + bm_lewis AussieOnc + am_adam
recordings.notes: Generated locally with Kokoro open-source neural TTS and FFmpeg broadcast processing. Fenrir owns schedule and room-map reads. Rebecca is the high-hype female DJ reporter. AussieOnc uses Kokoro bm_lewis as an Australian-style global hype reporter. Adam owns the snarky social-media feed reads. Spoken ASCO is rendered as Ask-oh.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher Fenrir schedule, Rebecca reporter, and Adam social ASCO 2026 Day 1 run
recordings.notes: Generated locally with Kokoro open-source neural TTS and FFmpeg broadcast processing. Fenrir owns schedule and room-map reads. Rebecca is the high-hype female DJ reporter. Adam owns the snarky social-media feed reads. Puck is no longer used. Spoken ASCO is rendered as Ask-oh, and Adam uses the heavier club-DJ bass pass.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher Kokoro Fenrir one-minute schedule desk
recordings.notes: One-minute open-source Kokoro Fenrir voice segment used for schedule, rooms, agenda timing, and movement through the ASCO program.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher Rebecca one-minute high-hype reporter desk
recordings.notes: One-minute open-source Kokoro af_bella voice segment named Rebecca, used for high-hype conference reporting, poster-wall heat, media desk callouts, and source-first DJ energy.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher AussieOnc one-minute Australian-style hype desk
recordings.notes: One-minute open-source Kokoro bm_lewis voice segment named AussieOnc, used for Australian-style global hype reporting and source-forward conference pulse checks.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher Kokoro Adam one-minute snarky social desk
recordings.notes: One-minute open-source Kokoro Adam voice segment used for snarky social-media reads, audience tags, snack chatter, hallway buzz, and operator-reviewed posts, with extra low-end weight and higher club-DJ energy.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher ASCO 2026 Day 1 one-minute intro
recordings.notes: Renderer copies this cached MP3 into day1-opening-voice.mp3 when the working voice file is missing, avoiding a new ElevenLabs charge for reruns.
